title: SIGABRT with defparam
body:
### Description
When running `verilator --cc` on this program
```verilog
module module_0;
  defparam id_13.id_14 = -id_13,
      id_15 = id_14;
endmodule
```
Verilator throws an internal fault: 
`
%Error: Verilator internal fault, sorry. Suggest trying --debug --gdbbt
%Error: Command Failed ulimit -s unlimited 2>/dev/null; exec /usr/local/share/verilator/bin/verilator_bin --cc bug.v
`

When compiling with `--debug` and `--gdbbt`, there is a SIGABRT: 
` 
Program received signal SIGABRT, Aborted.
`
### Verilator's version
Verilator 5.027 devel rev v5.026-29-ge3e7b3f2b

### OS Version
WSL2 Ubuntu
